## Verses (21)

| # | Basic English Bible | Compare |
|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | And Eliphaz the Temanite made answer and said, | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | If one says a word, will it be a weariness to you? but who is able to keep from saying what is in his mind? | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | Truly, you have been a helper to others, and you have made feeble hands strong; | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | He who was near to falling has been lifted up by your words, and you have given strength to bent knees. | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | But now it has come on you and it is a weariness to you; you are touched by it and your mind is troubled. | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
| [6](BBE.md#v6) | Is not your fear of God your support, and your upright way of life your hope? | [WEB](WEB.md#v6) · [KJV](KJV.md#v6) · [ASV](ASV.md#v6) |
| [7](BBE.md#v7) | Have you ever seen destruction come to an upright man? or when were the god-fearing ever cut off? | [WEB](WEB.md#v7) · [KJV](KJV.md#v7) · [ASV](ASV.md#v7) |
| [8](BBE.md#v8) | What I have seen is that those by whom trouble has been ploughed, and evil planted, get the same for themselves. | [WEB](WEB.md#v8) · [KJV](KJV.md#v8) · [ASV](ASV.md#v8) |
| [9](BBE.md#v9) | By the breath of God destruction takes them, and by the wind of his wrath they are cut off. | [WEB](WEB.md#v9) · [KJV](KJV.md#v9) · [ASV](ASV.md#v9) |
| [10](BBE.md#v10) | Though the noise of the lion and the sounding of his voice, may be loud, the teeth of the young lions are broken. | [WEB](WEB.md#v10) · [KJV](KJV.md#v10) · [ASV](ASV.md#v10) |
| [11](BBE.md#v11) | The old lion comes to his end for need of food, and the young of the she-lion go wandering in all directions. | [WEB](WEB.md#v11) · [KJV](KJV.md#v11) · [ASV](ASV.md#v11) |
| [12](BBE.md#v12) | A word was given to me secretly, and the low sound of it came to my ears. | [WEB](WEB.md#v12) · [KJV](KJV.md#v12) · [ASV](ASV.md#v12) |
| [13](BBE.md#v13) | In troubled thoughts from visions of the night, when deep sleep comes on men, | [WEB](WEB.md#v13) · [KJV](KJV.md#v13) · [ASV](ASV.md#v13) |
| [14](BBE.md#v14) | Fear came on me and shaking, and my bones were full of trouble; | [WEB](WEB.md#v14) · [KJV](KJV.md#v14) · [ASV](ASV.md#v14) |
| [15](BBE.md#v15) | And a breath was moving over my face; the hair of my flesh became stiff: | [WEB](WEB.md#v15) · [KJV](KJV.md#v15) · [ASV](ASV.md#v15) |
| [16](BBE.md#v16) | Something was present before me, but I was not able to see it clearly; there was a form before my eyes: a quiet voice came to my ears, saying: | [WEB](WEB.md#v16) · [KJV](KJV.md#v16) · [ASV](ASV.md#v16) |
| [17](BBE.md#v17) | May a man be upright before God? or a man be clean before his Maker? | [WEB](WEB.md#v17) · [KJV](KJV.md#v17) · [ASV](ASV.md#v17) |
| [18](BBE.md#v18) | Truly, he puts no faith in his servants, and he sees error in his angels; | [WEB](WEB.md#v18) · [KJV](KJV.md#v18) · [ASV](ASV.md#v18) |
| [19](BBE.md#v19) | How much more those living in houses of earth, whose bases are in the dust! They are crushed more quickly than an insect; | [WEB](WEB.md#v19) · [KJV](KJV.md#v19) · [ASV](ASV.md#v19) |
| [20](BBE.md#v20) | Between morning and evening they are completely broken; they come to an end for ever, and no one takes note. | [WEB](WEB.md#v20) · [KJV](KJV.md#v20) · [ASV](ASV.md#v20) |
| [21](BBE.md#v21) | If their tent-cord is pulled up, do they not come to an end, and without wisdom? | [WEB](WEB.md#v21) · [KJV](KJV.md#v21) · [ASV](ASV.md#v21) |
